headline: Take-Two Stock Jumps on Buzz About GTA VI Preorders
summary: An email about forthcoming Best Buy sales, suggests preorders for Grand Theft Auto VI are slated to begin in a few days.

headline: Best Buy debuts consultation spaces within Ikea stores
summary: The project at two Ikea locations builds on the retailers' existing shop-in-shop partnership at Best Buy.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Best Buy Co, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Zachary Fadem   maintains Best Buy Co (NYSE:BBY) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $70 to $60.
